name: Protege XL

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: B588C278-17E5-4B66-A3B5-E93B6CC8AE3B

comment: Protégé XL: The Protégé XL’s color and effects systems have been engineered to unlock maximum creative potential. Its disc-based CMY color mixing and variable CTO allow designers to blend and fine-tune hues with precision, while a dedicated color wheel with six dichroic options provides instant access to bold, saturated looks. Two independent rotating GOBO wheels, each loaded with seven replaceable glass patterns, expand the fixture’s textural possibilities, while dual overlayable 6-facet prisms (linear and circular) and a dynamic animation wheel make it easy to generate everything from subtle movement to dramatic aerial effects. Medium and heavy frost filters are also on board, allowing the creation of soft-edged wash output

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
All on - all in - all out (fast - slow)
Half open - full access - half open (fast - slow)
Half open - all out - half open (fast - slow)

capability.comment: CMY / Color Macro Speed Max -> Min

capabilities.comment: Effect Reset 2 (Prism Frost Focus and Zoom)

gwSpecs.description: The Protégé XL’s color and effects systems have been engineered to unlock maximum creative potential. Its disc-based CMY color mixing and variable CTO allow designers to blend and fine-tune hues with precision, while a dedicated color wheel with six dichroic options provides instant access to bold, saturated looks. Two independent rotating GOBO wheels, each loaded with seven replaceable glass patterns, expand the fixture’s textural possibilities, while dual overlayable 6-facet prisms (linear and circular) and a dynamic animation wheel make it easy to generate everything from subtle movement to dramatic aerial effects. Medium and heavy frost filters are also on board, allowing the creation of soft-edged wash output
